name: Excalibur Prime
description: Excalibur Prime is the epitome of mobility and offense, and features the same abilities as Excalibur, but has unique mod polarities installed allowing for greater customization.
passiveDescription: Excalibur Prime deals |DAMAGE|% increased damage and attacks |SPEED|% faster when wielding swords.

abilities.name: Slash Dash
abilities.description: Slash and dash through enemies alongside a radial specter. The powerful Exalted Blade’s slashes inflict <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status.

abilities.name: Radial Blind
abilities.description: Emit a bright flash of light, blinding all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Radial Javelin
abilities.description: Radial javelins impale nearby enemies, inflicting <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status.

abilities.name: Exalted Blade
abilities.description: Summon a sword of pure light and immense power.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Excalibur Umbra will lose the Health increase from Arcane Blessing after using Transference.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed ammo pools not being shared properly across NPCs (Specters, Wukong’s Clone, Excalibur Umbra on Transference, and Equinox’s other half while using the Duality Augment Mod). 
This falls in line with other AI fighters like Excalibur Umbra and Wukong’s clone

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Hey Kiddo Operator being invisible or swapped with Excalibur at multiple points in the Chimera Prologue Quest. 
Fixed script error related to Excalibur’s Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed clipping issues with the Voidshell Excalibur skin’s armor.
Excalibur Umbra is unable to pick up his own ammo while using bows. We are actively looking for a solution, in the meantime, you can use Transference to refresh his ammo reserves.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Excalibur Umbra is unable to pick up his own ammo while using bows. We are actively looking for a solution, in the meantime, you can use Transference to refresh his ammo reserves.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Starter Warframe Ability Changes: Excalibur, Mag, & Volt
Updated the FX with an accompanying Excalibur phantom trail after performing a Slash Dash.
patchlogs.fixes:
This update also has a heavy focus on Quality of Life (QOL) changes including a rework to Spearguns, the three starter Warframes (Excalibur, Mag, and Volt), improvements to Riven database collecting, a whole slew of  Warframe Augment Mod buffs, and more to be discovered below.
Fixed Excalibur Umbra randomly deactivating Exalted Blade when playing as Operator.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur Prime showing up in the Equipment category in your profile when you don’t own him.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.changes: Fixed switching to the last position you left Excalibur Umbra instead of your current position as Operator before Transferring back to Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur’s Radial Blind
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Bloodshed sigil fully appearing when entering Operator mode while using Excalibur Umbra.
Fixed transferring to Operator as Excalibur Umbra counting towards the exterminate enemy counter in the Mastery Rank 30 test.

patchlogs.name: Garuda Prime: Update 31.3
patchlogs.changes: Check out our official website for full details on the 9 Year Anniversary Merch, Steadfast Excalibur Anniversary Contest, and more! https://www.warframe.com/anniversary

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Update 31.2.0 + 31.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed cases where Excalibur Umbra might lose his Health increase after using Transference. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1299812-excalibur-umbra-loses-health-after-using-transference-investigating/

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed dying as Operator in the Mastery Rank 24 test respawning you as a mini Excalibur.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Client players teleport to Excalibur Umbra when using Transference.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes: This also fixes a long-standing bug where a Warframe that has no default Shoulders Attachments (let's say, Excalibur) and had nothing equipped there, if you clicked on "left arm" then it would auto-select the first shoulder armor in your owned list.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a crash that could occur when Transferring from Excalibur Umbra to a Necramech,
Fixed UI not updating when attempting to Invigorate Excalibur Umbra which then resulted in a script error.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur being displayed when viewing the Operator collections in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Stalker cosplaying as Excalibur in the ‘What Stalker?’ Bundle Market Diorama.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur: 250% Melee Damage and 75% power Efficiency
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Furious Javelin buff becoming permanent and stacking on itself by manipulating recasting and buff timer.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur's Exalted Blade being invisible when using Pistols and Glaives.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Hotfix 30.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur Umbra not attacking when in Melee range when you have no Melee weapon equipped.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur being on display instead of Xaku when viewing the Xaku Collection in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Umbra Excalibur no longer using guns when you Transference to Operator mode and he is fighting autonomously.
Fixed Excalibur Umbra holding his sheath during the whole final cinematic in The Sacrifice Quest. 
Fixed Excalibur Umbra equipped with Melee-only not moving or attacking enemies unless they are close, while the player is using the Operator.

patchlogs.name: Star Days: Hotfix 29.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur Umbra falling through the map if Transference is used in certain places within the Cambion Drift. As reported here.

patchlogs.name: Star Days: Update 29.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Excalibur’s Slash Dash.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Prime Vault 29.5.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error with Excalibur’s Slash Dash.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Added shadow casting light to Excalibur’s Exalted Blade when Deferred Rendering is enabled.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tsujinasa Syandana not properly attaching to Excalibur Umbra.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur Blade of the Lotus Skin by BeastBuster

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Necramech appearing crushed around an Excalibur when viewed via Look Link or Mod Link.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes:
So if you have Excalibur in the chair 
For example, if you wanted Shock applied to Excalibur on Configuration A but wanted Configuration B and Configuration C to stay default with Slash Dash, you can do so!

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur Exalted Blade

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes:
Banshee, Excalibur Umbra, Frost, Nekros, Nova, Nyx, Saryn, Valkyr, and Zephyr Ability videos have been added to their respective Arsenals! 
Minor tweaks to Excalibur’s Radial Javelin cast effect and gave it some ground interaction (ice chunks when cast over ice, etc).
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixes towards clipping issues from upper leg armor pieces on Excalibur. 
Fixed Excalibur’s Ion Helmet appearing as his default in the Conclave Arsenal after being equipped in the co-op Arsenal. This also fixed being unable to equip the Ion helmet while in the Conclave Arsenal.
Fixed a script error that could occur if you were swinging Excalibur’s Exalted Blade at the same time as you activated a context action.
Fixed script error that could occur when jumping down into the darkness in the Apostasy Prologue as Excalibur Umbra.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a copy of your Warframe being created after selecting the Dry Dock as Operator and Transferring back to Warframe. This also fixes issues of having a bunch of sentient Excalibur Umbras running around.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed players in Towns, Relays and Dojos sometimes staying as blue Excalibur (loading) until they moved.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Lich ‘Ruse’ clones displaying the default Excalibur Helmet on their shoulder instead of the same Warframe Helmet as their owner.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed your Kuva Lich having the default Excalibur Helmet on their shoulder if you killed the Kuva Larvling as a Client. 
Fixed Excalibur’s Chromatic Blade elemental FX and statistics on Exalted Blade not updating after you change your Energy colour. Instead, they are stuck on the default Electricity element.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Elemental FX not working properly on Excalibur Deluxe Nikana.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.6.1

patchlogs.fixes:
Fixes towards Excalibur Zato’s front cloth clipping which could sometimes result in weird triangle cloth textures.
Fixes towards clipping issues with Excalibur Zato’s left shoulder fur cloth.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed left hand clipping on Excalibur Zato idle animation.

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemy ragdolls sometimes going wild for Clients when they are killed by Excalibur’s Radial Javelin.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Narvarr Prime Shoulder Armor clipping through Excalibur Umbra.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Furious Javelin not always removing the previous buff if you recast before it expires.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed experiencing a functionality loss in the form of one or more weapons/Abilities not working after falling into a teleport volume while having an active Exalted weapon (Excalibur / Wukong).
Fixed the ‘Toggle’ for Excalibur Umbra’s details to hide / show his details on Skins not actually being visible.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a [PH] tag in Excalibur’s Slash Dash tooltip.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zanuka being unable to capture Hildryn, Wisp, Revenant, Chroma, Frost, Excalibur, Inaros, Nova, Vauban, Volt, Wukong, Ash, Hydroid, Mag, Trinity, Titania and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Secondary Energy not being inherited by Exalted weapons (Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, etc).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed UI indicating that Excalibur’s Exalted Blade is still Channeling if you Transfer to O

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Excalibur Ion Skin by Yatus

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.additions: Added sword impact sound effect to Excalibur’s Slash Dash for a little added oomph as your slice through your foes!
patchlogs.changes: Respective Ability videos now also appear upon hover-over to add that little extra spice! This initial Ability video aspect is currently functional for Excalibur, Mag, Volt, Garuda, Baruuk, Revenant, and Hildryn! More to gradually come!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Magus Repair not affecting Excalibur Umbra.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur missing his ground slam sound when using his Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.1.0 - TennoGen Round 14
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Excalibur’s Radial blind ability.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed issues with Excalibur's Pendragon helmet cloth lagging at lower framerates. 
Fixed issues with Excalibur Umbra's scarf disconnecting at times.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Exodia Valor applying to Excalibur’s Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.8.0 + 23.8.0.1 + 23.8.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability to trigger Exodia Arcanes on Exalted Melee weapons. Exodia Arcanes still apply to Zaws, just not in Exalted Melee (Excalibur, Valkyr, etc) form.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Excalibur Umbra’s Radial Howl not working as intended. Radial Howl now removes the opponents jump and deals damage.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur Umbra no longer requires a Fragment Scan to unlock for Frame Fighter. He will be available upon completing The Sacrifice quest.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.4.0
patchlogs.changes: through Standing. Choose from Excalibur, Volt and Mag, each with their unique Ability. Unlock additional Frame Fighter Warframes by discovering Fragments throughout the Solar Chart. If the scanned Warframe’s Prime is in your Inventory, you can toggle to the Prime version of the acquired character

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.1.0: TennoGen Round 13
patchlogs.changes:
Excalibur Ronin Skin by Rekkou
Excalibur Exaltation Skin by Cheshire

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using a Warframe with an Exalted Melee weapon (Excalibur, Wukong or Valkyr), certain actions will lead to a weird "in-between" state, where your Exalted Melee Stance incorporates moves from your currently equipped melee weapon.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to purchase the Excalibur Umbra Glyph.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed new players who picked Excalibur not receiving his Exalted Blade in the Arsenal, making it unModdable. Affected players will now see the intended Exalted Blade Arsenal slot.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.3 - Limbo Prime
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked Umbra’s Radial Howl animation to have a very similar cast time and FX to Excalibur’s Radial Blind.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur missing his Radial Blind sound when doing slide attack with Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.2 + 23.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed entering your Arsenal with Excalibur’s Exalted Blade active causing no Mods to appear in the Modding UI. 
Fixed Energy colour element not appearing when you change your Energy colour on an Excalibur equipped with the Chromatic Blade Augment.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.changes:
Excalibur/Prime’s Exalted Blade 
We gave the Blade a partial physical design (hilt) so that you can customize its appearance (Energy color is still determined by Excalibur’s)! 
Increased Excalibur Prime’s Armor from 250 to 300.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a random Excalibur appearing unannounced (like really, no one invited him) at Onkko’s shop when attempting to assemble an Amp and at Hok’s Anvil when assembling a Zaw.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Commodore Prime Operator suit and Excalibur Dex Skin having incorrect textures.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the emissives of the Excalibur Sentient Slayer Skin.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error with Excalibur’s Slash Dash.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.18.0
patchlogs.changes: Removed Excalibur’s 3 second cooldown on Radial Blind.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.16.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Warframe Arcane in the second slot not triggering if the Excalibur Dex Helmet is equipped.
Fixed Excalibur’s Radial Blind preventing recastable Abilities from being recast while active.
Fixed being unable to equip the Excalibur Dex Helmet in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Arcanes working inconsistently on Exalted Abilities (Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, etc) or Weapon Abilities (Titania’s Razorwing, etc).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Trinity Knightess and Excalibur Corpra Helmet being Arcaned.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Warframe Specters are now much smarter! If you don't recall, Specters are craftable gear you can equip to summon an AI companion in battle. We've done a general intelligence pass on their proficiency with Weapons, and we've also updated their power-casting logic. Virtually every power is now castable with only a few exceptions! Specters CANNOT cast the following Abilities: Vauban's Minelayer, Ivara's Zipline, Titania's Razorwing, Nekros’ Desecrate and Shadows of the Dead, Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Valkyr’s Hysteria, Wukong’s Primal Fury, Cloud Walker, and Defy, Atlas’ Petrify and Tectonics, Limbo's entire kit (save for the damage aspect of Banish), and finally Zephyr’s Dive Bomb.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed getting no additional damage from Excalibur's passive when using Excalibur with a sword or rapier Zaw.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed not being able to Melee again upon throwing the Sigma & Octanis shield while using Exalted Blade on Excalibur, until you deactivate and reactivate the power. 
Fixed a script crash that would occur when trying to Mod your Melee weapon in the Simulacrum Arsenal while Excalibur’s Exalted Blade is active.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Igaro Day of the Dead Syandana appearing offset when equipped on Excalibur, Nyx, Nyx Nemesis Skin, or Nyx Prime.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Warframes using the Excalibur mesh for a few frames when first opening the Simulacrum Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Excalibur’s Exalted Blade ability.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Toned down the smoke FX of Excalibur’s Radial Blind.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.7.0

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Chromatic Blade Augment not adding Elemental FX to the energy wave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that would occur when activating Excalibur’s Exalted Blade (and other similar abilities) then entering the Arsenal and going to the Melee weapon upgrades screen in Captura and the Simulacrum.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.8 + 21.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Clients downed while using Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Wukong’s Primal Fury, or Valkyr’s Hysteria would be unable to switch weapons when revived.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting and deactivating Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Wukong’s Primal Fury, or Valkyr’s Hysteria while in Dual-Wield mode resulting in the UI stating the name of your Pistol and ability used.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Berserker Mod not applying to Excalibur’s Exalted Blade and its waves.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.changes: Slightly tweaked Excalibur's Noble stance to have better trigger placement with his fingers.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed loading into a Lunaro lobby and only seeing ghostly Excalibur placeholders.

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Riv Elite Leg Guard sitting incorrectly on Excalibur.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed players showing as “ghost Excalibur” in the dojo if they load in and don’t move.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a mini Excalibur mesh showing over top of the Operator in The War Within missions.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Lowered the brightness on Excalibur's Blind cast and Drone Explosion deaths to avoid excessive bloom.
Increased the flight speed of Excalibur's Exalted Blade projectiles in Conclave.
Increased the flight speed of Excalibur's Exalted Blade projectiles in Conclave.
Excalibur's Radial Javelin damage increased in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed seeing players who have not moved as ghostly-blue Excaliburs when loading into Relays or the Dojo.

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to stack speed buffs exponentially with Dispatch Overdrive and a toggled 4th Warframe ability (Excalibur, Valkyr, etc) .

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur and Limbo having a duplicate skin to equip.

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using Valkyr's Hysteria/Excalibur's Exalted Blade/Wukong's Primal Fury during a ‘Weapon Only’ Sortie resulting in "Power In Use" when casting any ability for the remainder of the mission.

patchlogs.changes: Excalibur’s Radial Blind

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed seeing all other players in the Relay as Excalibur until they move.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed friendly Excalibur Specters affecting you with their Radial Blind ability.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U1.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a texture issue with the TennoGen Excalibur Caduto skin.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U1.2 + U1.3

Excalibur

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed being able to use your weapon ultimate (Excalibur, Valkyr, etc.) endlessly without Energy consumption.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.4 Operation Rathuum.
patchlogs.changes: Increased the resolution and slightly altered the tinting of Excalibur Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes: we've added PBR Upgrades on Nyx Prime, Ember Prime, Rhino Prime, and Excalibur Prime!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed badge placements on Excalibur, Chroma, Mirage, Saryn and Atlas.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: A unique skin for the Excalibur Warframe, designed by CommanderApocalypse.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Decreased the damage and range of Excalibur’s Slash Dash in Conclave.
Excalibur’s Radial Blind and Radial Javelin will no longer stagger boss-type enemies.
Fixed the Stalker’s Acolytes looking like Excalibur in the Codex.
Fixed Warframes with ‘alternate weapon’ ultimates (i.e. Valkyr, Excalibur, etc) not properly earning Focus when using these Warframe-specific weapons.
Fixed Pakal armor accessories sitting improperly on Excalibur when wearing the Proto-Armor skin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the effectiveness of Excalibur’s passive in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Radial Blind animation improperly looping if interrupted by a knockdown, execution, Slash Dash, or Radial Javelin as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/485127-radial-blind-bug/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.1: Operation Shadow Debt.
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an error with Excalibur’s Radial Blind ability where its effectiveness against eligible bosses was not diminished with each consecutive use.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a visual FX issue that would occur with Excalibur’s Radial Javelin when used at max speed as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/593022-max-casting-speed-with-excaliburs-radial-javelin-bug/
Fixed the Stagger from Excalibur’s Slash Dash not properly taking the Anticipation Mod’s affect in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.3.1 + 18.3.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s passive not properly applying to Rapier weapons as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/594563-rapier-does-not-get-the-excaliburs-sword-bonus/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a memory leak that would occur with Excalibur’s Radial Javelin’s projectile FX.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.2.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an error preventing players from using their weapons or abilities after using Ivara, Valkyr or Excalibur’s 4th Ability Power.
Fixed an error that would prevent Clients from being able to use their powers as Valkyr, Wukong, Ivara or Excalibur if meleeing while their 4th Ability Power was ending, or being deactivated due to a Nullifier bubble.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the End of Mission screen sometimes improperly displaying an unranked Excalibur icon.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes:
Mag, Volt and Excalibur are now purchasable through Teshin’s Conclave Offerings at the Typhoon rank.
Increased the damage of Excalibur’s Slash Dash in PvP.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed players being able to cast Excalibur’s Radial Blind continuously while firing a weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.12.0
patchlogs.changes: Proto-Armor Excalibur

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur’s Radial Javelin is now affected by Intensify in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.2
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of Excalibur’s Slash Dash in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Excalibur and Valkyr not receiving credit for kills from Exalted Blade and Hysteria respectively.
Fixed an issue causing Excalibur to load at the end of a Mission as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/516685-why-do-we-start-as-excalibur-after-ending-a-mission/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Prisma skin showing excessive bloom when customized with lighter colors.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Proto Excalibur Helmet not being able to take Arcane enhancements.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes: Reduced camera shake FX when using Excalibur’s Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Reduced damage and range of Excalibur’s Slash Dash in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Energy effects from elemental Mods will no longer display on Excalibur’s Exalted Blade.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Excalibur’s Radial Blind animation repeating if its activation is interrupted by a knockdown, or the use of another Ability Power.
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade’s energy waves not being stopped by Corpus Nullifier shields.
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade improperly taking on stances from other equipped melee weapons and vice versa.
Fixed Excalibur Prime’s sword being at an incorrect position in his Codex diorama.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.11.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed instances of Excalibur’s Radial Blind animation repeating if players are interrupted by knockdowns or when using Slash Dash or Radial Javelin while casting.
Fixed players receiving a ‘power in use’ message when casting Excalibur’s Exalted Blade while switching to a melee weapon.
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade not actually showing the weapon in hand if cast while switching to a melee weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.10.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed channeling when using Excalibur’s Exalted Blade’s melee or projectile attacks not consuming additional energy.
Fixed Exalted Blade not properly gaining Excalibur’s passive upgrades with the proper melee weapon equipped.
Fixed Excalibur’s Slash Dash causing the player to dash through Nullifier bubbles.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.9.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Proto Glaive skin causing Exalted Blade to not appear properly in Excalibur’s hand.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.9.2 + 16.9.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade’s melee attacks always counting as though it were channeled.
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade copying melee Stance Mods, which would break functionality of the Ability.
Fixed an issue causing Excalibur’s Exalted Blade to not properly release energy waves.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.9.1 + 16.9.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur's Exalted Blade not inheriting any melee mods. This fix now allows the damage of Exalted Blade attacks to scale based on the mods of your Melee weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur has been rebalanced for PvP in accordance with his recent overhaul.
patchlogs.fixes:
Complement Excalibur's updated powers with these new items, available in the Market now:
Let Excalibur stand apart with skin and helmets forged from the purest Prisma Crystal.
This Excalibur Warframe has been coated with liquid Prisma, enriched by pure Void energy.
Three new, unique helmets for Excalibur, coated with liquid Prisma and enriched by pure Void energy.
Discovering the precise nature of the Excalibur Proto-Armor Skin has proved elusive. Initial attempts at dating point to ancient origins, perhaps even predating Orokin Empire. Get it from now until June 24 at 2 p.m. EDT -
Decorate your Liset with new Prisma and Proto-Excalibur Noggle Statues!
No matter your play style, Excalibur is always a formidable Warframe choice.  With newly re-worked Abilities, he is now more versatile than ever.
The following changes have been made to Excalibur’s Abilities.  Please note that we will continue to monitor these changes after launch to make any necessary tweaks to balance.
First Ability: Slash Dash: Slash Dash will now target enemies within a conal distance from Excalibur, targeting all enemies within the range of cast.  Enemies hit by Slash Dash will count towards the player’s melee combo counter.
Third Ability: Super Jump has been removed from Excalibur’s Abilities.
Third Ability: Radial Javelin is now Excalibur’s third Ability and costs 75 Energy to activate.
Fourth Ability: New Ability: Exalted Blade: Excalibur summons a sword of pure light and immense power.
Stat changes: Excalibur Armor:  Excalibur’s base has been increased to 225 and to 250 for Excalibur Prime.
Excalibur’s Abilities have all been given a visual overhaul in line with his new Exalted Blade ability.
Fixed a crash that would occur when joining a Mission through your Friends List as Excalibur Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur's Slash Dash damage has been increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect channeling FX on Excalibur’s Proto Armor skin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.4 + 16.4.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur’s Radial Blind now gets half its duration on targets that are looking away.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.3 + 16.3.3.1
patchlogs.changes:
Funnel Clouds: Tornado generates an additional X tornadoes, but tornadoes have reduced size and do not pull enemies.Excalibur 
(Note: In reference to discussed Future changes to Excalibur in Devstream 50, we may adjust of some of his Augment Mods in the future)

patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a game freeze that could occur when using Excalibur’s Radial Javelin on ragdolled enemies.
Fixed issue that caused Excalibur’s Radial Javelin to not kill enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Proto-Excalibur helmet not working with other skins.
Fixed players who purchased the Proto-Excalibur skin not receiving the Proto-Excalibur helmet.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Excalibur is no longer invulnerable when performing Slash Dash in PvP.
Fixed enemies becoming immune to melee attacks when hit with Excalibur’s Radial Javelin.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed animation timing for Excalibur’s Radial Javelin when used with cast speed Mods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the range of Excalibur's Radial Javelin in Conclave.
Slowed the activation / casting animations of Excalibur's Radial Javelin in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.2 + Anniversary Gifts
patchlogs.fixes:
·         Excalibur Proto Armor Skin
Excalibur’s Radial Javelin will now double check that enemies are within range before launching.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Removed dead animation time at the end of Excalibur’s Radial Javelin and radial Blind casting animations.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Psa: Excalibur Radial Javelin:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur skins showing up as fusible items in Arcane Foundry.

patchlogs.changes: Excalibur has been given a visual update via PBR!

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the appearance of Slender Excalibur in Archwing Missions.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed armor offsets on the Excalibur Proto Armor.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.changes: Added Melee Combo Counter to Excalibur’s Slash Dash.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Radial javelin doing 2x damage when cast by Clients as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/377871-excalibur-radial-javelin-bug/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Radial Javelin not stunning enemies who survive the attack.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue in Hive Infestation that caused Excalibur’s Radial Javelin to cease functioning.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Excalibur’s Radial Javelin and Mag’s Shield Polarize will now check for line of sight when targeting enemies.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with physics and effects of Excalibur’s Pendragon Helmet.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where players would receive PvP Excalibur Transmissions in Void Key missions.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Dev observed and experienced the uninhibited blinding effect in up to a 60 M Range with several environments coming between Excalibur and targets. This prompted review.
Thirdly, what you can expect down the road is Radial Blind functioning in a way that considers Line-of-sight. The 14.6.0 unintended version suffered from a lot of problems with this approach, and coming will be radically improved line-of-sight checks for Radial Blind. Targets behind cover that can still see Excalibur are blinded. Other bodies won’t inhibit their blindness, but walls will.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with new players loading into their ship as Excalibur despite selecting a different starting frame.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed players being sent into the Harvester mission as Excalibur with default weapons.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with file path strings appearing when using the Excalibur Proto armor skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Removed blood/dismembered Grineer from Excalibur's codex entry ...he didn't mean to hurt anyone.
